channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: South Africa's unprecedented new coalition has 7 parties in the Cabinet. Here's a breakdown
item.description: CAPE TOWN, South Africa (AP) — South African President Cyril Ramaphosa has included seven different parties in his Cabinet in an unprecedented power-sharing agreement in the continent's most industrialized country after the African National Congress lost its parliamentary majority in a milestone ele
item.dc:creator: GERALD IMRAY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Australia appoints second woman governor-general in 123 years to represent British monarch
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia appointed Sam Mostyn on Monday as only its second woman governor-general, a largely ceremonial role representing the British monarch who is the nation’s head of state.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Israel releases director of hospital it says was used as a Hamas base. He alleges abuse in custody
item.description: KHAN YOUNIS, Gaza Strip (AP) — Israel released the director of Gaza's main hospital on Monday after holding him for seven months without charge or trial over allegations the facility had been used as a Hamas command center.
item.dc:creator: MOHAMMAD JAHJOUH, SAMY MAGDY and JULIA FRANKEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: French far right leads after legislative elections' 1st round but rivals hope to deny it a majority
item.description: PARIS (AP) — France's National Rally surged into the lead in the first round of legislative elections, according to results released early Monday, bringing the far-right party to the brink of power and dealing a major blow to President Emmanuel Macron’s centrists in an election that could set the co
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER and BARBARA SURK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Supreme Court decision on Trump immunity expected Monday
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court's final day of the term will be Monday, when it issues a critical decision on whether former President Donald Trump has immunity from prosecution for his actions related to the Jan. 6, 2021, insurrection at the U.S. Capitol.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump ally Steve Bannon will report to federal prison to serve 4-month sentence on contempt charges
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Longtime Trump ally Steve Bannon is scheduled to report to a federal prison in Connecticut on Monday to serve a four-month sentence on contempt charges for defying a subpoena in the congressional investigation into the U.S. Capitol attack.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Dangerous Hurricane Beryl closes in on southeast Caribbean
item.description: SAN JUAN, Puerto Rico (AP) — Hurricane Beryl was closing in on the southeastern Caribbean, and government officials late Sunday pleaded with people to take shelter from the dangerous Category 3 storm. The storm was expected to make landfall in the Windward Islands on Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: DÁNICA COTO, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Jocelyn Nungaray murder: Texas county dubbed 'sanctuary for criminals' as Dem DA tries to shift blame
item.description: Harris County District Attorney Kim Ogg blamed the "broken" immigration system as two illegal immigrants were accused of killing 12-year-old Jocelyn Nungaray in Houston, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah family desperate for answers after man vanishes before lunch date with mom: 'He matters'
item.description: Justin Hooiman vanished after making plans to meet his mom for lunch in Salt Lake City in November 2017 – now police are looking into a potential homicide.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republican JD Vance journeys from 'Hillbilly Elegy' memoirist to US senator to VP contender
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — It was March 2022 and Senate candidate JD Vance was standing under hot lights in a Cleveland television studio debating four fellow Republicans on whether the U.S. should support a no-fly zone over Ukraine, not a month into its grinding war with Russia.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Biden’s future, Trump’s immunity dominate presidential campaign
item.description: President Biden’s family urged him to stay in the race for reelection, a source confirmed to NewsNation.
item.dc:creator: Rich Johnson, NewsNation

item.title: 3 million student loan borrowers won't owe a payment in July: Here's why
item.description: About 3 million student loan borrowers will be placed in forbeareance in July, despite two federal injunctions that came down last week.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, ABC 4

item.title: Man recovering from shark bite on Florida coast in state's third attack in a month
item.description: Three more attacks were reported in the U.S. — one in Southern California and two in Hawaii, one resulting in death.
item.dc:creator: DEVNA BOSE AP Health Writer, NewsNation

item.title: Father-son duo hits $1 million jackpot in Kentucky: 'I ain't ever eating bologna again'
item.description: “I said [to the clerk], ‘If I hit this million dollars, I ain’t ever eating bologna again,’” the dad said.
item.dc:creator: Madylin Goins, NewsNation

item.title: Federal judge grants preliminary injunction halting controversial Oklahoma immigration law
item.description: The new law, which was scheduled to go into effect on July 1, has been met with opposition from many different organizations.
item.dc:creator: Xavier Richardson/ KFOR, NewsNation

item.title: Family demands accountability for NY police killing of 13-year-old boy. Police said he aimed BB gun
item.description: On Wednesday, Nyah Mway finished middle school in the central New York city where his family moved about a decade ago as refugees from Myanmar, relatives said.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump immunity decision in balance as Supreme Court caps term
item.description: The Supreme Court is set to rule on Monday whether former President Trump has immunity from criminal prosecution, a monumental decision that comes just days after the court dropped a decision throwing into doubt charges against hundreds of Jan. 6 rioters and Trump himself.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: More than 2.8 million student loan borrowers won't owe a payment in July: Here's why
item.description: About 3 million student loan borrowers will be placed in forbeareance in July, despite two federal injunctions that came down last week.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, KTLA 5

item.title: Rare white buffalo sacred to Native Americans not seen since June 4 birth: officials
item.description: Video above: Yellowstone visitors hope to catch glimpse of rare white buffalo Yellowstone National Park officials said Friday a rare white buffalo sacred to Native Americans has not been seen since its birth on June 4.
item.dc:creator: Kaycee Sloan, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Teen with pellet gun fatally shot by police: Body cam footage released as community calls for accountability
item.description: Police say the 13-year-old aimed an object - later identified as a pellet gun - at them before he was fatally shot. The boy's family is now calling for the officers to be "put in jail.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Donovan, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Having a child? These are the popular baby-naming trends to know — or avoid
item.description: Couples struggling to find the perfect name for their baby have plenty of resources to help them gather a list of possible choices. But as it just so happens, many of these parents-to-be are seeking the same types of names.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KRON4

item.title: Diddy dropped by powerful law firm at Lady Gaga's insistence: Source
item.description: Literally nobody in Hollywood wants to be near Diddy, not even his lawyers… who just fired him as a client.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Missing mom, 2 daughters may have been 'coerced to travel to Mexico': Kansas authorities
item.description: Investigators believe all three may have been coerced into traveling to "a religious rehabilitation facility" in Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Carina Branson, KRON4

item.title: Evacuation orders lifted for some Arizona residents forced from their homes days ago by a wildfire
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Evacuation orders in Arizona have been lifted for some residents of northeast Scottsdale, days after they were forced from their homes by a wildfire, authorities said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricane Beryl becomes 'extremely dangerous' Category 4 storm
item.description: Hurricane Beryl strengthened into what experts called an "extremely dangerous” Category 4 storm as it approaches the southeast Caribbean.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fire captain deployed to Ground Zero on 9/11 dies in Colorado rafting mishap
item.description: A Utah fire captain who was deployed to Ground Zero after the 9/11 terrorist attacks was killed in a rafting accident in Colorado last week, officials have confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, KRON4

item.title: Why some ice creams are sold by the 'squround' and some aren’t
item.description: Ice cream is frequently sold by the pint, the cone, the sandwich or — somewhat less often — the taco. But you buy it by the "squround" too, even if you don't realize it.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KTLA 5

item.title: Hurricane Beryl becomes 'extremely dangerous' Category 4 storm
item.description: Hurricane Beryl strengthened into what experts called an "extremely dangerous” Category 4 storm as it approaches the southeast Caribbean.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: American and British voters share deep roots. In 2024, they distrust their own leaders, too
item.description: DARTFORD, England (AP) — Distrust has settled over the campaign trails in the United States and United Kingdom ahead of July 4 like a soggy summer haze.
item.dc:creator: LAURIE KELLMAN and CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Northern lights: Will you get to see them again this summer?
item.description: In May, the northern lights reached as far south as Florida and Hawaii for the first time in years — could it happen again?
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: 13-year-old dies in New York after being shot by police
item.description: UTICA, N.Y. (WSYR-TV) — A 13-year-old who pointed a pellet gun at police officers chasing after him was shot and killed by one of the officers late Friday night in Utica, New York, local police said Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dave Longley, Fox 5

item.title: Exotic mammal native to Central and South America spotted at Washington rest stop
item.description: Also referred to as “honey bears," the species is usually found in tropical rainforests from southern Mexico to Brazil.
item.dc:creator: Jashayla Pettigrew, WGN 9

item.title: Tropical Storm Beryl forecast to become a major hurricane as it approaches the southeast Caribbean
item.description: Tropical Storm Beryl chugged toward the southeast Caribbean on Saturday as forecasters warned it was expected to strengthen into a dangerous major hurricane before reaching Barbados late Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Danica Coto, WGN 9

item.title: Video shows NY officer fatally shooting 13-year-old on ground. Police say he pointed a replica gun
item.description: Newly released video shows an officer in upstate New York fatally shooting a 13-year-old boy who had been tackled to the ground after he ran from police while pointing a replica handgun.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Animal rescuers try to keep dozens of dolphins away from Cape Cod shallows after mass stranding
item.description: WELLFLEET, Mass. (AP) — Animal rescuers were trying to keep dozens of dolphins away from shallow waters around Cape Cod on Saturday after 125 of the creatures stranded themselves a day earlier.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: A San Francisco store is shipping LGBTQ+ books to places where they are banned
item.description: A bookstore in San Francisco is sending boxes of LGBTQ+ books to places in the country where they are banned.
item.dc:creator: Jaimie Ding And Haven Daley, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Biden rallies for LGBTQ+ rights as he looks to shake off an uneven debate performance
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Joe Biden courted LGBTQ+ voters with two New York events on Friday and warned about Donald Trump returning to the White House, as he looked to shake off a widely panned debate performance.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, WGN 9
